THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MOTION FROM JUL-17-2024 TO JUL-24-2024, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AND SELECT A SPECIFIC NOVEMBER 2024 TRIAL DATE. SELECTED TRIAL DATE MUST HAVE ALREADY BEEN CLEARED WITH THEIR EXPERTS REGARDING AVAILABILITY FOR TRIAL. MOVING PARTY TO E-FILE STIPULATION INDICATING AGREED UPON TRIAL DATE. ADDITIONALLY, MOVING PARTY TO EMAIL SAID FILED STIPULATION WITH A PROPOSED ORDER TO DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG. IF STIPULATION IS FILED AND ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR AT THE 7/24/24 CONTINUED MOTION HEARING. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A NEW TRIAL DATE, THEY ARE EXPECTED TO APPEAR IN PERSON AT THE 7/24/24 HEARING. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
